titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Talhah Ibn Zayd

text: و ما كان فيه عن طلحة بن زيد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن يحيى الخزّاز؛ و محمّد بن سنان جميعا عن طلحة بن زيد.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Talhah ibn Zayd has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Khazzaz and Muhammad ibn Sinan together, from Talhah ibn Zayd.
